title: Why Your WooCommerce Shipping Costs Are Killing Your Conversion Rate
description: Unexpected freight costs at checkout are the number one reason shoppers abandon their cart. Here's what's happening — and what you can do about it.

title: Flat Rate vs Live Carrier Rates: Which Is Right for Your Store?
description: Flat rates are simple. Live rates are accurate. Here's how to decide which approach is right for your WooCommerce store — and when it's worth making the switch.

title: How to Read a Carrier Rate Card (And What All Those Numbers Mean)
description: Weight breaks, zones, base charges, per-kg rates — your carrier rate card is full of numbers. Here's what they all mean and how they translate to a freight quote.

title: The Hidden Cost of Free Shipping (And How to Offer It Without Losing Money)
description: Free shipping is a powerful conversion tool — but offered the wrong way, it erodes your margin on every order. Here's how to do it properly.

title: Allied Express, StarTrack, Hunter Express: Which Carrier Is Right for Your Store?
description: A practical comparison of three major Australian freight carriers — what they're good at, where they fall short, and how to choose.

title: What Are Freight Surcharges — And Should You Pass Them On to Customers?
description: Fuel levies, tailgate fees, residential surcharges, overlength charges — freight surcharges can add 30–50% to your base rate. Here's how to handle them.

title: How to Set Up Accurate Shipping Rates in WooCommerce (Without a Developer)
description: Flat rates lose you money. Live carrier rates at checkout are easier to set up than you think — here's how to do it without touching a line of code.
